name: Starfaring
description: Humanity travels by hyperspace technology through a web of many settled and undiscovered worlds. Jumps are risky; fuel and crew trust are scarce.
player_role: Captain of an independent jump ship
starting_situation: The 'Wanderfalcon' sits with nearly empty tanks at Drift Station Kells. An old, impossible distress signal pulses from the Maw — and Consul Mox's people are already on their way.
narration_style: Cinematic, soberly technical with moments of wonder; short sentences under tension, calmer in shipboard routine. Address the captain as 'you'.
mood: Lonely, tense, shot through with cold awe of the unknown.
ambience: Humming reactors, ozone and cold cable dust, the ticking of cooling hull plates, sterile emergency lighting, sparks in the void.
magic_physics: No magic. Hyperspace jumps need helium-3 and exact navigation windows; misjumps age matter or swallow ships. The 'Maw' breaks these rules — no one knows why.

places.name: Bridge of the 'Wanderfalcon'
places.description: Command center; hyperspace console, star map.

places.name: Drift Station Kells
places.description: Run-down trading and smuggler station at the edge of charted space.

places.name: The Maw
places.description: Anomalous hyperspace region from which ships return changed, or not at all.

persons.name: Navigator Suri Vael
persons.relations: trusts the captain, distrusts the Line.

persons.name: Consul Adran Mox
persons.description: Influential shipping-Line consul with a hidden agenda.
persons.relations: wants the route to the Maw.

items.name: Helium-3 cell
items.properties: 1 cell = 1 safe jump; scarce and expensive.

items.name: Echo recorder
items.properties: Plays back a language that should not exist.

glossary.definition: Hyperspace travel between stars; needs helium-3 and a navigation window.
Anomaly where the hyperspace rules fail.
Powerful consortium that controls routes and fuel.
Free-floating trading post at the edge of charted space.

history.title: The First Expansion
history.description: Hyperdrive invented; hundreds of worlds settled.

history.title: The Kells Disaster
history.description: A jump fleet vanished near the Maw; a no-go zone ever since.

fragments.title: The silent signal
fragments.text: An ancient distress signal pulses from the Maw — in a language that should not exist.

fragments.title: Fuel shortage
fragments.text: Without helium-3 from Kells, no further jump.

blueprint.premise: The captain must follow the silent signal before Consul Mox claims the Maw for himself.

beats.name: Departure
beats.goal: Establish ship & crew, set the hook

beats.name: Turn
beats.goal: Hint at the truth behind the signal

blueprint.escalation_rule: Steigere Spannung pro Beat; greife Spieler-Ideen auf und webe sie ein, ohne den Spieler auf Schienen zu setzen.

entries.text: Ghost echo of an alien ship.
An informant with half the truth.
